creator: moonshade@pnhz.kz
text:
multimedia/mplayer-skins installing skins to /usr/local/share/mplayer/Skin
But multimedia/mplayer searches in /usr/local/share/mplayer/skins

Fix: 

cd /usr/local/share/mplayer
ln -s Skin skins
How-To-Repeat: 

1. Install both multimedia/mplayer and multimedia/mplayer-skins.
2. Run gmplayer in X session.
3. Try to change skin.
